## Summary

Describe the change in 1-3 sentences.

## Type of change

- [ ] Patch
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test-only
- [ ] Security/safety

## Safety checklist

- [ ] I did not commit secrets, sessions, personal memory, vector DB files, uploads, or backups.
- [ ] I considered whether this affects auth, memory, RAG, tools, audit, or system prompt behavior.
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior changed.

## Tests

Paste the relevant result, for example:

```text
python -m pytest -q
```

## Rollback notes

How can this be reverted if needed?
